name: Pixeltable
description: Multimodal AI data infrastructure: tables, computed columns, embedding indexes, document/video iterators, and a persistent Python REPL via MCP.
installHint: Server is installed from GitHub via uvx --from (not on PyPI). Optional OPENAI_API_KEY enables vision/LLM tools; CLIP and local embeddings work without it.

envFields.label: Pixeltable home directory
envFields.helperText: Optional alternate data directory. Defaults to ~/.pixeltable when unset.

envFields.label: OpenAI API key
envFields.helperText: Optional. Needed for OpenAI chat/vision computed columns; not required for CLIP or local embeddings.
